LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TONI PAOLI-BATES' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO MENDOCINO COUNTY. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2016 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TONI PAOLI-BATES' Motion For Change Of Venue is granted. Plaintiff does not oppose the motion. The case is transferred to Mendocino County. Plaintiff shall pay all transfer costs. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Continued To Jun-08-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT TONI PAOLI-BATES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, Ms. Paoli-Bates' motion to set aside entry of default is granted and she is required to respond to the complaint within 20 days. While the moving papers do not present the strongest case of excusable neglect, those papers do show a sufficient ground for the relief sought, particularly in light of the strong public policy in favor of deciding cases on their merits. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Continued To Apr-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
